The '''''Huntsman''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was to arrive as reinforcements along with [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] should the [[Tortali Platform]] be unable to handle the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike force.

{{Ship-stub}}
